# Pinned versions for reproducibility builds.
#
# Each entry is the exact commit hash or release tag that the trust
# chain depends on. Do NOT edit casually — these pins define what the
# zisk-fv proofs are about. CI verifies the live tree matches.

# ZisK source tree (vendored as git submodule at vendor/zisk; cited
# from transpile_* axiom rationales).
zisk-submodule-commit      = 48cf7ccefb5ed62261abf6bfb007b5be8a23c547

# Pilout build inputs (used by repro/Dockerfile.pilout).
# These are the actual versions that produced the vendored
# pil/zisk.pilout — forensically reconstructed from the host
# /home/cody/zisk reflog and confirmed by structural-fingerprint
# match.  ZisK source is the user's personal fork (zksyncos branch)
# that adds a u256_delegation precompile on top of upstream v0.15.0.
pilout-zisk-repo           = https://github.com/codygunton/zisk.git
pilout-zisk-commit         = 0bfdc9582a485ab82df4f085817c7f1c05e686a4
pil2-compiler-tag          = v0.8.0
pil2-proofman-tag          = v0.15.0

# Sail-Lean toolchain (used by repro/Dockerfile.sail-lean).
# rems-project/sail and riscv/sail-riscv at HEAD on 2025-12-26 06:18 UTC,
# the timestamp at which NethermindEth/sail-riscv-lean cron-regenerated
# commit 81c8c84f. NethermindEth's CI does not pin its upstreams, so we
# pin them here for reproducibility.
sail-commit                = 277470b2ab472af8064e1295be5573845239c96b
sail-riscv-commit          = 04e595954b2af7fa9e18f2519e4ae4bba72b2701
ocaml-version              = 5.2.1

# Resolved Lean dependencies (Lake manifest is the source of truth;
# these are tracked here so a one-shot grep finds them).
lean-rv-commit             = 81c8c84f919b6b565790713e2049a88b88739cda
leanzkcircuit-commit       = 8631b11de51c68288b519e8032019524b84a365f
